training_rows: task_id=fixed_direct | input=fixed equals prompt | output=fixed token
task_id=loss_direct | input=loss equals prompt | output=loss token
objective=paired_terms | first=fixed | second=loss | answer=fixed then loss
paired_block order=fixed_loss | fixed branch answer fixed | loss branch answer loss
objective=paired_terms | first=loss | second=fixed | answer=loss then fixed
paired_block order=loss_fixed | loss branch answer loss | fixed branch answer fixed
contrast fixed_branch keeps fixed and does not answer loss
contrast loss_branch keeps loss and does not answer fixed
boundary fixed answer remains fixed even when loss is nearby
boundary loss answer remains loss even when fixed is nearby

rows: task_id=fixed_direct | input=fixed equals prompt | output=fixed token
task_id=loss_direct | input=loss equals prompt | output=loss token
objective=paired_terms | first=fixed | second=loss | answer=fixed then loss
paired_block order=fixed_loss | fixed branch answer fixed | loss branch answer loss
objective=paired_terms | first=loss | second=fixed | answer=loss then fixed
paired_block order=loss_fixed | loss branch answer loss | fixed branch answer fixed
contrast fixed_branch keeps fixed and does not answer loss
contrast loss_branch keeps loss and does not answer fixed
boundary fixed answer remains fixed even when loss is nearby
boundary loss answer remains loss even when fixed is nearby

contract.promotion_requirement: fixed-direct and loss-direct heldout continuations must both hit before pair-probe promotion
contract.leakage_policy: use task-id and paired-block descriptions, but never train on exact heldout direct or pair probes
contract.source_route_boundary: created after light capacity probe matched fixed-recovery without recovering loss

check_rows.detail: contract follows only a ready objective-structure plan
plan must request this contract artifact
objective-structure rows must be substantial enough to materialize
fixed/loss direct row families must be balanced
forward paired block rows must be present
reverse paired block rows must be present
fixed, loss, and pair probes must be preserved
exact eval prompts must not be training rows
heldout pair probe must stay out of training rows

interpretation.reason: The contract replaces single-sided row patching with task-id and paired-block objectives while preserving heldout probes.
interpretation.next_action: materialize the objective-structure contract into a training corpus and heldout fixture
